key_bug_features: mclient dump fails on UTF-8 character
bug_features_seed:
CREATE TABLE "test"."city" (
         "id"     int PRIMARY KEY,
         "name"   varchar(100) NOT NULL,
         "region" varchar(100),
         "population" int CHECK ("population" >= 0),
         "lat"    double,
         "long"   double,
         "int1"   int DEFAULT 0,
         "int2"   int,
         "int3"   int,
         "int4"   int
 );
